# Shipment Module

Module ID: shipment
Status: draft
Purpose: Shipment batches and fulfillment workflow with idempotent completion and shipment events.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Owned tables: shipment_batches, shipment_items, domain_events
Primary use cases: createShipment, getShipment, listShipments, completeShipment, cancelShipment
Invariants: external references are unique per tenant/source, completion references are unique per tenant, completed shipments replay safely, completed shipments cannot be cancelled, cancelled shipments cannot be completed.
